thing-type.label: Rachio Sprinkler Controller
thing-type.description: The things controls one sprinkler controller, which might have multiple zones.

parameter.name: deviceId
parameter.label: Controller ID
parameter.description: Rachio API controller/device UUID. This is not the MAC address. Required for manually created controller Things.

channel-type.label: Name
channel-type.description: The name of the sprinkler controller. This could be configured using the Rachio App.

channel-type.label: Active
channel-type.description: ON: Controller is active, OFF: Controller is suspended

channel-type.label: Online
channel-type.description: ON: Controller is online, OFF: Controller is offline, check internet connection

channel-type.label: Paused
channel-type.description: OFF: active watering run is not paused, ON: pause active watering run for pause-time seconds

channel-type.label: Pause Time
channel-type.description: Number of seconds to pause the active zone run when paused receives ON. Range is 0 to 3600 seconds.

channel-type.label: Sleep Mode
channel-type.description: Indicates whether the Rachio device sleep mode is active.

channel-type.label: Stop Watering
channel-type.description: ON: stop watering for all zones, OFF: n/a

channel-type.label: Run Multiple Zones
channel-type.description: ON: start watering for selected zones (''=ALL), OFF: n/a

channel-type.label: Run Zone List
channel-type.description: Zones to run at the same time (''=run ALL)

channel-type.label: Run Time
channel-type.description: =0, use default run time, >0: Start zones for given number of seconds

channel-type.label: Rain Delay
channel-type.description: >1: Rain delay device

channel-type.label: Rain Sensor Tripped
channel-type.description: Indicates whether the rain sensor is currently tripped.

channel-type.label: Active Zone Number
channel-type.description: Zone number of the currently active watering run, populated from webhook zone run events.

channel-type.label: Active Zone Name
channel-type.description: Name of the currently active watering zone, populated from webhook zone run events.

channel-type.label: Active Zone ID
channel-type.description: Rachio zone ID of the currently active watering zone, populated from webhook zone run events.

channel-type.label: Latitude
channel-type.description: Latitude of the device location

channel-type.label: Current Schedule ID
channel-type.description: Rachio schedule ID for the currently running schedule.

channel-type.label: Current Schedule Name
channel-type.description: Name of the currently running schedule.

channel-type.label: Current Schedule Type
channel-type.description: Type of the currently running schedule.

channel-type.label: Current Schedule Start
channel-type.description: Start time of the currently running schedule.

channel-type.label: Current Schedule End
channel-type.description: End time of the currently running schedule.

channel-type.label: Current Schedule Duration
channel-type.description: Duration of the currently running schedule in seconds.

channel-type.label: Current Schedule Running
channel-type.description: ON when Rachio reports a currently running schedule.

channel-type.label: Last API Event Type
channel-type.description: Type of the most recent event retrieved from the Rachio event history endpoint.

channel-type.label: Last API Event Time
channel-type.description: Time of the most recent event retrieved from the Rachio event history endpoint.

channel-type.label: Last API Event Summary
channel-type.description: Summary of the most recent event retrieved from the Rachio event history endpoint.

channel-type.label: Forecast Summary
channel-type.description: Summary from the Rachio forecast endpoint.

channel-type.label: Forecast High
channel-type.description: Today's forecast high temperature.

channel-type.label: Forecast Low
channel-type.description: Today's forecast low temperature.

channel-type.label: Forecast Precipitation
channel-type.description: Today's forecast precipitation amount.

channel-type.label: Precipitation Probability
channel-type.description: Today's forecast precipitation probability as a 0..1 fraction.

channel-type.label: Forecast Wind
channel-type.description: Today's forecast wind speed.

channel-type.label: Forecast Updated
channel-type.description: Timestamp of the forecast data when provided by Rachio.

channel-type.label: Last Skip Type
channel-type.description: Most recent weather intelligence skip event type.

channel-type.label: Last Skip Schedule ID
channel-type.description: Schedule ID associated with the most recent weather intelligence skip event.

channel-type.label: Last Skip Start
channel-type.description: Start time associated with the most recent weather intelligence skip event.

channel-type.label: Last Skip Reason
channel-type.description: Summary or reason from the most recent weather intelligence skip event.

channel-type.label: Schedule Name
channel-type.description: Name of schedule.

channel-type.label: Schedule Info
channel-type.description: Brief description of schedule.

channel-type.label: Schedule Start
channel-type.description: Start of schedule.

channel-type.label: Schedule End
channel-type.description: End of schedule.

channel-type.label: Last Update
channel-type.description: Timestamp of last status update.

channel-type.label: Last Event
channel-type.description: Events can be received when callback is configured.

channel-type.label: Last Event Time
channel-type.description: Timestamp of last status update.
